omitted_declarations.policy_reference: You may add data such as username, gender, birthdate, education, and occupation, as well as a publicly visible bio, to the News account. We use this information to provide you with a more personalized experience. If you log in using Facebook or Twitter, we will receive your account username and profile picture from those sites. If you log in using your phone number, your phone number will be used as your display name. We will retain data you upload to your account for as long as your account is active. We process this data based on your consent. You can modify your account, withdraw consent, and delete data by navigating to your application's settings menu.

When you install an Opera application, a random installation ID is generated. We collect this identifier, as well as device ID, hardware specifications (model, release date, etc.), operating system, environment configuration, and feature usage data. We use this data to improve our products and services. For example, we may use it to analyze how our users interact with our applications, or to determine the effectiveness of promotional campaigns, or to detect and debug problems. We have no practical way to use this information to identify you personally. We may retain this usage data for up to three years. You can opt out of reporting Usage statistics through the application settings menu and disabling Usage statistics at the bottom of the settings menu.

We use this data to improve our products and services. We have no practical way to use this information to identify you personally. We may retain this usage data for up to three years. You can opt out of reporting Usage statistics through the application settings menu and disabling Usage statistics at the bottom of the settings menu.

As described in our terms of service, our Software is ad-supported. Ads help us keep the lights on and continue to provide free products for our users. In order to provide our news services and serve targeted ads, we collect data such as advertising IDs from your device and your general location, as well as data you submit to us if you choose to create or update a user profile (such as your name, birth date, phone contact list, occupation, etc.). These targeted ads are provided by our monetization partners. We process this data based on your consent. You can always adjust your personalized ad choices or withdraw your consent in the application's "Settings" menu.

Our Software's core function is to provide you with news content tailored to your interests. In order to do this, we collect various data about you and your interests through the Software. We process advertising IDs, device data (phone manufacturer and model, device preferences) and information about your general location (specific to approximately which city you live in). If you choose to provide it to us by filling in your profile, we may also collect your phone contact list, and personal information like gender, education, occupation, birthdate, and other profile-related information. Additionally, if you log in with Facebook, we may receive your Facebook friends list. We retain this data for up to four years. We also collect data about which articles, videos, or other content you view, share, like, or respond to, which we retain for up to one year. We process this data based on your consent. If you would like to withdraw your consent, you may do so through the "Settings" menu.

Depending on where you live, you may be able to access the Hype messaging service within the Software. If you choose to use Hype, you will be prompted to provide your phone number, which is required to operate the service. You will also be asked if you agree to give Hype access to your contacts, in order to connect with other Hype users. You do not need to share your contacts in order to use the service. We will retain your phone number and contacts for as long as you use Hype. Additionally, you also have the option to upload profile information at your discretion, including a user name, avatar, and your friends. We use the data you provide in order to provide the service. If you delete your account, or go inactive for a while, we will retain this data for a short period of time in case you decide to reactivate.
